name: Weintraubentorte (Grape Torte)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and sugar into a medium-size bowl. Cut in butter or margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
2. Add egg, egg yolk, lemon rind, and salt; mix with a fork to form dough.
3. Cover dough and let rest in the refrigerator for 20 minutes.
4. Roll out dough into a circle and place it in an ungreased springform pan. Form a 1-inch high rim.
5. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 10 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, clean and halve the grapes, removing seeds if necessary. Beat egg whites until stiff; blend in sugar, lemon juice, and ground almonds.
7. Carefully fold in the grapes.
8. Remove cake from the oven. Fill the baked cake shell with grape mixture, return to the oven, and bake for another 30 minutes at 350°F.
9. Remove cake from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
